steps.assistant_text: 37-insn init+dispatch wrapper. Promoted from -O2-blocked NM cap via file-split into bootup_uso_o0_100F0.c. Same recipe as bootup_uso_o0_118E4.c earlier today (2026-05-14). The K&R arg-save + per-statement reload pattern + dead 'b +1; nop' BB markers are unmistakable -O0 emit. Bundled func_0001016C as INCLUDE_ASM for layout contiguity (1016C migrates to C body in future pass).

RETRACTION+RE-MATCH 2026-06-10: the 2026-05-14 body was a FALSE MATCH (landed during the land-script byte_verify regression). It emitted 0x94 bytes vs the 0x7C target (plain locals -> stack temps) and shifted bootup_uso +0x18. Genuine match found: (1) register int *p homes the vtable base in $s0; (2) the p-assignment must be EMBEDDED in the call's argument expression so one $t9 a0-load serves both the p-load and the addu arg add (per-statement -O0 reloads would emit an extra lw); (3) arg order *(short*)(p+0x60) + (int)a0. Verified 0 word diffs over the full 0x7C incl. relocs at link.

metadata.verification: Verified via byte_verify: build/non_matching/.o byte-identical to expected/.o (size 0x94 = 148 bytes / 37 insns). Required -O0 file split out of bootup_uso_tail1.c (which is -O2).
